player: For the first time in a week I can see in every direction.
That is not entirely a good thing.
elias: We make the saddle before that, we'll be all right.

maya: Drone coverage is lighter in the high terrain, but 'lighter' isn't 'none.'

elias2: For us? Depends on how bad you are at being wet and cold.

player: Recent. Within a month, maybe less.
elias: Check the bed. Sometimes there's fuel in the undercarriage reserve.
maya: Here. Two gallons. Not full but not nothing.

player: How far will she take us?
The sky is the color of a bruise.

system: A drone patrol materializes from the low cloud cover.

player: We've been low on supplies for a while.
At some point 'low' becomes something else.
elias: Tomorrow I'll hunt if the rain clears.
There are rabbits in the north bowl. I saw sign this morning.

player: From here I can see south.
All the way back to the ridge.
All the way to where we started.
elias: It'll make you think you can go back.
maya: The plains are east of here.

system: The open road ahead is a different kind of danger.
